.canvas-node-container .markdown-rendere.--h1-color: oklch(from var(--i-lt-heading-accent, red) var(--i-lt-heading-colored-l, 50%) var(--i-lt-heading-colored-c, 50%) calc(h + var(--i-lt-h1-h)))
.canvas-node-container .markdown-rendere.--h2-color: oklch(from var(--i-lt-heading-accent, red) var(--i-lt-heading-colored-l, 50%) var(--i-lt-heading-colored-c, 50%) calc(h + var(--i-lt-h1-h) + (var(--i-lt-h6-h) - var(--i-lt-h1-h)) * 0.2))
.canvas-node-container .markdown-rendere.--h3-color: oklch(from var(--i-lt-heading-accent, red) var(--i-lt-heading-colored-l, 50%) var(--i-lt-heading-colored-c, 50%) calc(h + var(--i-lt-h1-h) + (var(--i-lt-h6-h) - var(--i-lt-h1-h)) * 0.4))
.canvas-node-container .markdown-rendere.--h4-color: oklch(from var(--i-lt-heading-accent, red) var(--i-lt-heading-colored-l, 50%) var(--i-lt-heading-colored-c, 50%) calc(h + var(--i-lt-h1-h) + (var(--i-lt-h6-h) - var(--i-lt-h1-h)) * 0.6))
.canvas-node-container .markdown-rendere.--h5-color: oklch(from var(--i-lt-heading-accent, red) var(--i-lt-heading-colored-l, 50%) var(--i-lt-heading-colored-c, 50%) calc(h + var(--i-lt-h1-h) + (var(--i-lt-h6-h) - var(--i-lt-h1-h)) * 0.8))
.canvas-node-container .markdown-rendere.--h6-color: oklch(from var(--i-lt-heading-accent, red) var(--i-lt-heading-colored-l, 50%) var(--i-lt-heading-colored-c, 50%) calc(h + var(--i-lt-h6-h)))

.file-embed.background: rgb(249, 249, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-property-key.background: color(srgb 0.91888 0.8872 0.9928) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(249, 249, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-tab-header-container.background: rgb(249, 249, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--i-editor-border-hover: hsl(from var(--i-editor-border) h s calc(l - 5 * var(--i-lt-l-multiplier)))

body.styled-scrollbars.--i-editor-border-hover: hsl(from var(--i-editor-border) h s calc(l - 5 * var(--i-lt-l-multiplier)))
